privileged_info_summary: The grayscale_convert@1 task uses a real colorful flower image (800x533 JPEG) downloaded from Unsplash (photo-1441974231531-c6227db76b6e). The image has substantial color content (variance 15.96, RGB channel differences >13). The primary Unsplash URL is valid and accessible. The fallback URL returns HTTP 404. The task requires converting the color image to grayscale using GIMP and exporting the result as flower_grayscale.jpg. No metadata field exists in task.json.
